setupSubtitle: Complete these steps to get your team started
allStepsComplete: All {{count}} steps completed. Your organization is ready to go!
showSetupGuideHint: Reopen the step-by-step organization setup checklist

companyInfo.title: Set company info
companyInfo.description: Add your company name, logo, country, and address

departments.title: Add departments
departments.description: Create departments like Engineering, HR, Finance, etc.

shifts.title: Configure shifts
shifts.description: Set up work shifts with start/end times and grace periods

locations.title: Add office locations
locations.description: Add GPS coordinates for your offices for attendance verification

teams.title: Create teams
teams.description: Organize employees into teams with team leaders

leavePolicy.title: Set leave policy
leavePolicy.description: Configure default leave allocations (Annual, Casual, Sick)

holidays.title: Add holidays
holidays.description: Set up your organization's holiday calendar

employees.title: Add employees
employees.description: Invite your team members to start using RH_Eletropasso
